title: Love and Larceny
writer: Agenore Incrocci, Furio Scarpelli, Sergio Pugliese
actors: Vittorio Gassman, Dorian Gray, Anna Maria Ferrero
plot: Gerardo, an aspiring theater actor, is roped into performing a scam but gets double crossed by his partner and goes to prison. After prison, he turns into a successful con artist using his ability to mimic different Italian dialects.
